subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter thou had written for Mírza Munír has been perused and despite the shortage of time, a brief reply is provided.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بجناب میرزا منیر مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @Shrines and Holy places, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
